summary: Large one-file texpdag decomp PR. It replaced placeholder markers for HSD_TExpMakeDag, SimplifySrc, SimplifyThis, and SimplifyByMerge with substantial C implementations, added required debug/assert support and static .sdata, and made small matching-oriented edits in order_dag and make_full_dependancy_mtx. decomp.dev reported make_full_dependancy_mtx became a 100% match and several previously-unmatched functions improved, but HSD_TExpSchedule regressed by 1 byte and overall matched code dipped slightly.

key_files.role: Only changed file; gained C for texture expression DAG construction and simplification helpers, plus matching nudges in existing DAG scheduling/dependency code.

what_changed.details: Replaced the placeholder with a C implementation that asserts the root is HSD_TE_TEV, walks color and alpha TEV inputs to collect unique HSD_TExp nodes, initializes distance storage, calls CalcDistance, sorts by distance, and fills HSD_TExpDag entries with idx, tev, nb_ref, nb_dep, and depend links.
Added static int HSD_TEXP_MAX_NUM = 20 and included baselib/debug.h so the new DAG-building code can use HSD_ASSERT with original-looking line constants.

Changed bitmask temporaries new_available, blocked, and dep_bits from int to u32 and introduced temporary pointer locals sp8, spC, and sp10 before recursive calls, apparently to steer stack/register allocation for matching.
Adjusted local assignment order by computing flag = 1 << j and preserving old/full[j] before the inner loop; decomp.dev reported this item moved from 98.83% to 100.00%.

Replaced the placeholder with C that recursively simplifies child TEV expressions, clears sources whose child op is 0xFF, forwards simple GX_TEV_ADD sources when inputs/bias/scale allow it, and maintains HSD_TExpRef/HSD_TExpUnref plus texture/raster resource fields.

Added an iterative local simplifier that resets unused tex/ras resources, drops unused color or alpha operations when refs are zero, simplifies TEV op cases based on HSD_TE_0/HSD_TE_1 inputs, clears arguments, and repeats until no changes remain.

Added an iterative merge pass that folds compatible child TEV expressions into the parent for color and alpha paths, handling op/bias/scale/clamp compatibility, texture/channel resource conflicts, swaps, and reference counts.
Added HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8 = 0x7FF00 and HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC = NULL, then used them through CLEAR_ARG-style stores to reset HSD_TEArg values in a matching-friendly way.

smart_moves: Kept the change concentrated in src/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag.c, making it easy to attribute the decomp.dev report to one unit.
Used exact-width types for bitset logic in order_dag; changing int masks to u32 is a common way to fix sign/rlwinm/cmplwi-style mismatches in dependency bit matrices.
Introduced stack-named temporaries and loop_N labels where needed instead of over-cleaning the code, preserving compiler-shape evidence for recursive graph code.
Factored repeated argument clearing and bias/resource checks into macros while still preserving low-level store patterns such as *(u32*) arg plus exp = NULL.
Preserved reference accounting when simplifying or merging sources: copied args are ref'ed and replaced child expressions are unref'ed.
Guarded SimplifySrc and SimplifyByMerge against texture object, raster channel, tex_swap, and ras_swap conflicts before folding child expressions.
decomp_lessons: Partial decomp of large helper routines can be valuable even without 100% matches: this PR moved SimplifySrc, SimplifyThis, SimplifyByMerge, HSD_TExpMakeDag, and .sdata from 0% to substantial percentages in the bot report.
Do not rename source typos casually: the file uses make_dependancy_mtx and make_full_dependancy_mtx with the original misspelling, and the bot reports that symbol spelling.
For graph/bitset scheduling code, local type signedness and assignment placement can be enough to make or break a match.
When matching MWCC code that walks adjacent struct arrays, pointer arithmetic through u8* plus sizeof(HSD_TEArg) may be necessary even when a cleaner array-index expression exists.
Static address-named data such as HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8/HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC should be preserved until the real data meaning is proven; they may be required for .sdata layout and store shape.
Landing a new match can still perturb nearby existing matches; decomp.dev reported make_full_dependancy_mtx fixed but HSD_TExpSchedule broke by 1 byte.
naming_conventions: Public HSD texture-expression APIs use HSD_TExp* prefixes, e.g. HSD_TExpMakeDag and HSD_TExpSimplify.
Internal simplification helpers in this file use mixed-case verb names: SimplifySrc, SimplifyThis, and SimplifyByMerge.
Dependency-matrix helpers preserve the original misspelling dependancy in make_dependancy_mtx and make_full_dependancy_mtx.
Unknown/static data was named by file/address placeholders: HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8 and HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC.
Matching scaffolding locals keep stack-like or label-like names such as sp8, spC, sp10, sp94, sp14, and loop_22.
Macros introduced in this PR use uppercase matching-helper style: CLEAR_ARG, BIAS_TO_INT, INT_TO_BIAS, and RESOURCE_CONFLICT.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added explicit stack pointer aliases before recursive order_dag calls to influence argument passing and stack layout.
Converted several order_dag bitmask locals from int to u32 to match unsigned bit operations.
Used gotos and loop_N labels in HSD_TExpMakeDag rather than structured loops where the original control flow likely required it.
Initialized the distance array with an unrolled 8-store loop followed by a remainder loop, matching compiler loop-unroll behavior.
Used u8 dep_count/dep_count2 and explicit casts on TEArg type checks to control compare width.
Used static .sdata constants and *(u32*) stores for HSD_TEArg clearing instead of purely field-by-field semantic initialization.
Reordered flag/old/bits assignments in make_full_dependancy_mtx; the automated report says this produced a full match.

review_feedback.details: GALE01 report: matched code 66.44% (-0.01%, -264 bytes). New match: main/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag make_full_dependancy_mtx +4 bytes, 98.83% to 100.00%.

Improvements in unmatched items: SimplifyByMerge +1948 bytes to 74.48%, SimplifyThis +1716 bytes to 79.76%, SimplifySrc +989 bytes to 95.47%, HSD_TExpMakeDag +736 bytes to 62.16%, .sdata +12 bytes to 75.00%.
No PR body, human review comments, or human review records were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching src/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag.c HSD_TExpSchedule to see whether the 1-byte regression was recovered.
Search for later improvements to HSD_TExpMakeDag, SimplifySrc, SimplifyThis, and SimplifyByMerge reaching higher or full match percentages.
Search HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8 and HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC for eventual semantic names or confirmation that they remain address placeholders.
Search CLEAR_ARG RESOURCE_CONFLICT BIAS_TO_INT INT_TO_BIAS for reuse or cleanup in later texpdag simplification work.
Check whether make_full_dependancy_mtx stayed at 100% after subsequent dependency-matrix or scheduling changes.
